positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical emblem illustration featuring a majestic, symmetrical owl perched upon an intertwined branch of celestial ivy. The owl has geometric, clean lines and large, penetrating eyes. The style is Neo-Art Deco meets mystical tattoo flash, using solid color blocks and strong black outlines. The color palette is limited to deep sapphire blues, burnished gold, forest emerald green, and creamy ivory. The composition must be central and easily readable as a repeat pattern or single chest print. Use a high-contrast, flat graphic style with deep shadows and crisp details. The overall feel should be elegant, arcane, and highly decorative.
